description: FinOps Foundation FOCUS 1.0 column reference for SaaS CUR output

columns.name: ProviderName
columns.description: SaaS provider name (e.g. GitHub, Anthropic, Datadog)

columns.name: BillingAccountId
columns.description: Provider-assigned billing account identifier

columns.name: BillingAccountName
columns.description: Human-readable billing account name

columns.name: BillingCurrency
columns.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP)

columns.name: BillingPeriodEnd
columns.description: Exclusive end of billing month — first instant of NEXT month (YYYY-MM-01T00:00:00Z)

columns.name: BillingPeriodStart
columns.description: Inclusive start of billing month (YYYY-MM-01T00:00:00Z)

columns.name: BilledCost
columns.description: Invoiced cost after all discounts applied

columns.name: EffectiveCost
columns.description: Amortized cost allocated over the usage period

columns.name: ListCost
columns.description: Cost at provider list price before any discounts

columns.name: ChargeCategory
columns.description: Highest-level charge classification (Usage | Credit | Adjustment | Tax)

columns.name: ChargeFrequency
columns.description: How often the charge recurs (Monthly | Daily | Hourly | One-Time)

columns.name: ChargePeriodEnd
columns.description: Inclusive end of the usage day (YYYY-MM-DDT23:59:59Z)

columns.name: ChargePeriodStart
columns.description: Inclusive start of the usage day (YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00Z)

columns.name: ServiceName
columns.description: Human-readable display name of the consumed service

columns.name: ConsumedQuantity
columns.description: Volume of the resource or service consumed

columns.name: ConsumedUnit
columns.description: Unit of measure for ConsumedQuantity (Seats, Tokens, Hours, GB, Requests…)

columns.name: RegionName
columns.description: Geographic region where the resource is consumed

columns.name: ResourceId
columns.description: Provider-assigned unique identifier for the consumed resource

columns.name: ResourceName
columns.description: Human-readable name of the consumed resource

columns.name: SkuId
columns.description: Provider SKU or plan identifier

columns.name: Tags
columns.description: JSON key-value metadata for cost allocation (e.g. {"team":"eng","env":"prod"})

columns.name: UsageType
columns.description: Category or type of usage (e.g. Compute, Storage, API Calls)

columns.name: ProductFamily
columns.description: Broad product family grouping (e.g. Developer Tools, AI / ML, Observability)
